prompt: Subject: Smile in the Dappled Sunlight. Main Subject: Vertical 3:4 photo. A woman in her 20s is sitting on a daybed in an outdoor resort, positioned prominently slightly left of center. This is a close-up portrait covering from head to upper thighs, with the subject occupying about 80% of the screen. She is leaning forward slightly, her arms naturally extended in front of her, captured in a friendly smiling moment toward the camera. Person/Expression: Natural skin texture with bright ivory-beige skin and a faint pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, tip of nose, shoulders, and collarbones, retaining pores and fine texture. Soft rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin lashes, natural tear troughs, soft brown brows, and translucent pink-beige lip gloss. A bright smile showing teeth naturally. Eyes look directly at the camera with small, clear catchlights. Hair is mid-long milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, delicate layers along the face, and ends curled loosely inward. Some hair falls naturally over shoulders and chest, depicting fine highlights, soft shine, and a small amount of stray hairs. Clothing/Pose: ivory-based floral halterneck bikini. The top has delicate scalloped lace edges, a small ribbon, and a gold charm in the center. The bottom ties at both hips with thin strings and layered small ruffles on the sides. The pattern is small botanical motifs in beige, light brown, and dusty blue. Elegant and cute, emphasizing fabric thinness, seams, and lace three-dimensionality. She sits shallowly on the daybed, leaning forward. Shoulders relaxed, head tilted slightly left. Arms extended to knees, hands naturally cut off near the bottom. Hips and legs rest stably on the daybed, with strings and ruffles hanging naturally with gravity. Fine water droplets on shoulders, arms, and abdomen. Background/Light: Tropical outdoor lounge. A wooden daybed with ivory cushions behind the person, a bright stone wall in the back left, and a thick wooden pillar in the back right. Dark and light green leaves, long tropical plants, and small red flowers in the background. Forefront is clear, background is smoothly blurred. Light is natural daytime sunlight from top right, dappled through leaves, casting light spots on hair, forehead, shoulders, arms, and chest. Shadows extend to the bottom left, with warm reflected light from walls and cushions. Deep green background separated from bright ivory subject. Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4. Shot from slightly above chest level at a light high angle. Face in top third, torso in middle, hips/thighs in bottom. Narrow margin at top, shoulder/plants on right, hair/stone wall on left. 35-50mm natural perspective. Precise focus on face/upper body, soft shallow depth of field for background. Texture/Style: High-quality photorealistic resort portrait. Photographically expresses bright natural light, delicate skin texture, wet hair reflections, and fabric/lace texture. Colors centered on ivory, beige, light brown, and deep green with natural saturation. Avoid excessive sharpness or skin smoothing, maintaining 3D feel and soft bokeh like a full-frame camera. Negative: Underage-looking person, unnatural face, asymmetrical eyes, unnatural smile, excessive chest emphasis, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, unnatural posture, clothes cutting into skin, poor lace connections, floating, unnatural water droplets, wrong perspective, inconsistent shadows, plastic skin, excessive smoothing, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

promptZh: 主题：斑驳阳光下的微笑。主体：3:4 竖构图照片。一位 20 多岁 的女性坐在户外度假村的躺椅上，位于画面中心略偏左的显著位置。这是一张从头部到大腿上部的特写人像，主体占据约 80% 的画面。她身体微微前倾，双臂自然向前伸展，捕捉到她对着镜头友好微笑的瞬间。人物/表情：自然的皮肤质感，明亮的象牙米色皮肤，透着淡淡的粉色红晕。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处有柔和的高光，保留了毛孔和细腻的纹理。柔和的玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及半透明的粉米色唇彩。明亮的笑容，自然露出牙齿。双眼直视镜头，带有清晰的小型眼神光。头发为中长款 奶茶灰棕色。轻薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有精致的层次感，发尾微微内扣。部分发丝自然垂落在肩膀和胸前，呈现出细腻的高光、柔和的光泽以及少量碎发。服装/姿势：象牙白底色花卉挂脖比基尼。上衣边缘有精致的扇形蕾丝，中心饰有小丝带和金色吊坠。下装两侧用细绳系带，并带有层叠的小荷叶边。图案为米色、浅棕色和灰蓝色的细小植物纹样。优雅可爱，强调面料的轻薄感、接缝和蕾丝的立体感。她浅坐在躺椅上，身体前倾。肩膀放松，头部微微向左倾斜。双臂伸向膝盖，手部在画面底部附近自然截断。臀部和腿部稳稳地靠在躺椅上，系带和荷叶边受重力影响自然下垂。肩膀、手臂和腹部带有细小的水珠。背景/光线：热带户外休息区。人物身后是带有象牙白垫子的木质躺椅，左后方是明亮的石墙，右后方是一根粗壮的木柱。背景中有深绿色和浅绿色的叶子、长条状热带植物以及红色小花。前景清晰，背景平滑虚化。光线为来自右上方自然的日间阳光，透过叶片形成斑驳光影，在头发、额头、肩膀、手臂和胸部投下光斑。阴影延伸至左下方，带有来自墙壁和垫子的温暖反射光。深绿色背景与明亮的象牙色主体形成对比。构图/相机：3:4 竖构图。从胸部略上方的高度拍摄，采用轻微的高角度。脸部位于上方三分之一处，躯干在中间，臀部/大腿在底部。顶部留白较少，右侧为肩膀/植物，左侧为头发/石墙。35-50mm 自然透视。焦点精确对准脸部/上半身，背景具有柔和的浅景深。质感/风格：高质量写实度假村人像。摄影化地表现明亮的自然光、细腻的皮肤纹理、湿发反光以及布料/蕾丝质感。色彩以象牙色、米色、浅棕色和深绿色为主，饱和度自然。避免过度锐化或磨皮，保持全画幅相机般的 3D 立体感和柔和的焦外成像。负面提示词：未成年长相、不自然的脸部、不对称的眼睛、不自然的笑容、过度强调胸部、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、不自然的姿势、衣服勒进皮肤、蕾丝连接处处理不当、漂浮、不自然的水珠、错误的透视、阴影不一致、塑料感皮肤、过度磨皮、乱码、Logo、水印。
